description: Transport emission factors by mode. Values represent average CO2-eq per tonne-km. Source: IPCC AR6 WGIII Annex III; EEA 2023 transport; ecoinvent 3.9 reference values.

GLO.source: IPCC AR6 WGIII global average road freight

CN.source: Synthetic: CN truck (older fleet, higher load)

GLO.source: IPCC AR6 WGIII global average rail freight

US.source: AAR 2022 US Class I freight rail
US EIA pipeline energy intensity proxy

_note: transport_factor is a STUB interface for Phase 2. The adapter currently marks transport rows as not_adapted. Phase 2 will resolve mode + distance from route metadata.
